q_quant_rationale: The analysis computes the delta between the two observed groups (7.4% increase) but does not compare to an 'expected', 'baseline', or 'assumed' value external to the query result.
q_aware_rationale: The analysis correctly reports the means (6.722 vs 6.259) and sample sizes (72 vs 293) and provides an 'inconclusive/suggestive but not conclusive' verdict.
